name: Tapestry, Inc.
description: Tapestry, Inc. is a global house of iconic brands, including Coach and Kate Spade New York. Headquartered in New York City, the company unites timeless craftsmanship with modern innovation to design and distribute luxury accessories and lifestyle products. By leveraging its world-class capabilities, financial power, and digital expertise, Tapestry aims to empower its brands and serve customers worldwide. The company focuses on delivering bold corporate responsibility goals while fostering a culture of creativity and inclusivity, ultimately stretching what is possible in the fashion industry to meet consumers where they are.
